positive: A whimsical, symmetrical pattern featuring abstract bioluminescent deep-sea life – glowing jellyfish, stylized luminous corals, and swirling plankton trails. The elements should be rendered in a minimalist, high-contrast vector style with clean silhouettes. Use a vibrant color palette of electric sapphire blue, neon cyan, lime green, and magenta. The composition should fill the entire frame (all over print), creating a mesmerizing, repeating tessellation suitable for textile printing. The style should evoke a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern psychedelic bioluminescence. Focus on crisp lines, defined negative space, and strong visual flow.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, messy, poor anatomy, grainy, grayscale, photorealistic, 3d render, messy background, complex scene, copyright
